Shell/WebTabBar.tokenBindings: Browser-chrome grays (#dcdcdc, #ebebeb, #b6b6b6, #262626, #353535, favicon #0072CE/#FF312C) kept as concrete colors — these are browser chrome, NOT DS semantic colors, and have no DS Variable equivalent. Shell/WebTabBar.assets: All chrome icons embedded as local SVG via createNodeFromSvg (downloaded from source node MCP asset URLs — they were SVG, not raster). No external library instances. Favicon symbol/window controls/back/forward/refresh/close/tab-shape all local vectors.

Login Input.packing: combineAsVariants left variants at original canvas coords; immediately repacked into 3-col x 4-row grid (pad 24, gapX 40, gapY 24, cell 460x44) and set resized to hug 1508x296. No width blowup.

structureChanges.detach: none (no variant contains a sibling-variant instance — no circular references)
